title: anagallis arvensis var. caerulea
intro: Anagallis arvensis var. caerulea, also known as blue pimpernel, is a variety of the anagallis arvensis plant, which is an annual or biennial herb with blue flowers. The medicinal properties of blue pimpernel include its use as a diuretic and a treatment for fever and rheumatism due to its high content of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits associated with blue pimpernel include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall health and well-being. In herbal preparations, blue pimpernel is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
